description: % padding/margin resolved against the containing width, min-width clamping a narrow box, overflow:hidden clipping a fixed/max-height box (re W n), and % offsets on a relatively-positioned box. Default base-14 font, so text stays searchable.
visual_assertions: The first box has visible vertical and horizontal percentage padding.
The min-width box is ~260pt wide despite an 80pt declared width.
The 15% left-margin box is pushed in from the content edge.
The overflow:hidden height:40pt box shows only its first two lines; later lines are clipped.
The max-height:30pt box is clipped after its first line.
The relatively-positioned box is shifted right by 10% of the content width.
